title: Meta-analysis: Mining 975 Expensive Training Runs (Part 1/3)
author: abaybektursun
novel_contributions: Built a database from all 409 submissions to the 8×H100 track
Created a three-step PR classification pipeline using an LLM-built taxonomy, per-PR tagging, and deterministic merging with logs and metadata
Analyzed technique associations across submissions and identified BigramHash, EMA, and XSA as strongly associated with better results
Reported that stacking more techniques stops helping after about 10 techniques
Found that 25–30M parameters at int6 is the sweet spot under the 16MB artifact limit
Found that early BPB at step 1,000 correlates strongly with final BPB
